name: Christopher Eng
bio: Christopher Eng is the Chief Information Officer at Guttman Community College – CUNY, where he leads a talented team of IT professionals focused on driving innovation and supporting student success. He recently earned his M.S. in Digital Forensic Science from Champlain College and is now exploring how to blend his interests and knowledge into the next chapter of his career. Outside of his professional life, he is a longtime car enthusiast. He formerly raced a 1999 Subaru Impreza 2.5RS and is hoping to get back out to his favorite track, Lime Rock Park. These days he likes tinkering with his classic 1961 Austin Mini or his delightfully oddball 1998 Mazda Bongo Friendee. He finds the greatest joy in time spent making memories with his partner and kids.
